trans-unit.source: Compare up to 4 Pokémon side by side. Enter a name or ID.
Discover and explore the entire Pokémon world.
No Pokémon found. Try a different search.
Open this tab to load moves.
All Pokémon moves with details. Click a row to expand.
Pokémon and all related names are trademarks of Nintendo.
Build a team of up to 6 Pokémon. Enter a name or ID in each slot.
Average damage taken from each attacking type
Types your team cannot hit super-effectively
Tap an attacker row or defender column to see matchup details
Could not load type data. Check your connection.
Primary type only · sorted by Pokédex number
